# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    parameters {
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_URL', defaultValue: '', description: 'URL of the build artifact to download')
        string(name: 'PROD_SERVERS', defaultValue: '', description: 'List of production servers separated by commas')
    }

    stages {
        stage('Download Artifacts') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def artifactName = "artifact-${env.BUILD_ID}.jar"
                    sh "curl -o ${artifactName} ${params.ARTIFACT_URL}"
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy to Production') {
            steps {
                script {
                    params.PROD_SERVERS.split(',').each { server ->
                        sh "scp ${artifactName} user@${server}:/path/to/deploy"
                        sshagent(['your-ssh-key']) {
                            sh "ssh user@${server} 'sudo systemctl restart your-service'"
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        always {
            cleanWs()
        }
    }
}
